payload.answer: Validated concept: storing a single 8000-word transcript as a conversation_summary card is feasible if the card preserves full fidelity and includes provenance. No current conflicting data detected in this context.

entity_resolution.reason: No persistent entity identifiers provided for transcript; treated as artifact with container card reference

memory_cards.statement: An 8000-word transcript of a conversation was proposed to be stored as a single memory card summary.

details: No hardened conflicts; design remains ambiguous due to lack of durable identifiers.

repair_options: Store transcript as a summary card with exact word-for-word fidelity and a separate provenance card linking to source transcript.
Split the 8000-word transcript into multiple smaller cards to improve retrieval granularity while maintaining a reference chain.
Include metadata fields (timestamp, author, source) for traceability.
